# BetterMe: Health Coaching · Fitness

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:11 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      5 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 23, 2026 - Jul 21, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _globe_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "app keeps crashing even after clearing cache, uninstalling and reinstalling the app"
            2. _Lijindev Keloth_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "Hey team, I have decided to leave this app even though my plan is still active. Your app has been testing my patience and the support given is also of no help. Every time I start working out with a lot of focus the app either app slows down or crashes , thus keeping away from my routine. There is no point in trusting this app even if it works for a day or two. Any day it can take a U-turn. this app is a good example of how an app can go from the best to the worst ( for me )."
            3. _Sabina Kotiranta_, May 23, 2026, 1/5: "would be nice if it stops crashing.... Reinstalled it twice now."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      4 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 2, 2026 - Jul 21, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ana K_, Jul 21, 2026, 1/5: "Red flag: Cancelling the subscription is very frustrating! I'm still trying to do it. You can't cancel it within the app, support points you to a non-existing item on the menu, and so on. The app itself has lots of workouts but there is no way to save favourites or find the ones you liked (descriptions are useless and they all look alike)... NOT a good experience."
            2. _I L_, Jul 14, 2026, 1/5: "i cancelled before the end of the trial period and I was charged anyway. When I contacted them, they said they could find my account. wow."
            3. _Ein Google-Nutzer_, Jun 2, 2026, 1/5: "this is a close to a scam... be aware that you only cancel the subscription after x-times having to confirm in the process and the again via email separately.. again. only then you are off the hook. (by the way, gets waaay cheaper if you cancel it)"
